revision.comment: 新規作成。

revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[ja:Category:茨城百景]] [[zh:Category:茨城百景]]

revision.comment: Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Merge [[Category:茨城県の自然景勝地]] into [[Category:Natural Scenic Sites of Ibaraki Prefecture]] via bot
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "): (Bot: update category metadata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on "
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom

Text replacement - "↵.↵" to "
"
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Bot: remove empty section(s)
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom

Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure

Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:qq]]"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Removing from [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q24869549)
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{座標一覧}}
{{Catmore}}
{{デフォルトソート:いはらきひやつけい}}
{{citation needed|いはらきひやつけい}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:茨城百景|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:茨城百景|version=65926344}}
{{wikidata link|Q24869549}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[ja:Category:茨城百景]]
[[zh:Category:茨城百景]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on Osugi Shrine]]
[[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on Shizu Shrine]]
[[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Ichinoya Yasaka Shrine]]
[[Category:100 views of Japan]]
[[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]
[[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]]
[[Category:Natural Scenic Sites of Ibaraki Prefecture]]
[[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]
[[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Jawiki pages with translated titles]] (crud category cleanup)

revision.comment: Bot: remove legacy category-page templates ({{デフォルトソート}}, {{citation needed}}) [[git:Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/22502775894|commit triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=100_Views_of_Ibaraki here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
